hero.subtitle1: From August 2, 2026, every European company using AI tools faces fines up to 7% of annual revenue.
hero.subtitle2: ShieldIQ makes you compliant in 48 hours.
hero.warning: 468 enforcement actions in 2024. Fines tripled. You could be next.

comeFunziona.title: How it works
comeFunziona.subtitle: Three steps to full compliance. No bureaucracy.
comeFunziona.step1Desc: 15 questions, 20 minutes. We analyze your infrastructure, the AI tools you use, and your data management processes.
comeFunziona.step2Desc: We identify regulatory gaps and quantify the risk in euros — so you know exactly what inaction costs you.
comeFunziona.step3Desc: Complete documentation with a remediation plan delivered in 48 hours. Audit and inspection ready.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.highlightSmall: Less than 10% of the average fine

questions.q1: How many employees does your company have?
questions.q2: What is your approximate annual revenue?
questions.q3: Do you use automated CRMs? (HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho...)
questions.q4: Do you use ChatGPT or other AI tools in daily work?
questions.q5: Do you have an up-to-date data processing register?
questions.q6: Have you appointed a DPO or privacy officer?
questions.q7: Are your IT vendors European or non-EU?
questions.q8: Have you suffered any data breach in the last 2 years?

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How long does the audit take?
faq.a1: The questionnaire takes about 20 minutes. Our AI analyzes the answers and generates the report within 48 hours of completion.
faq.q2: Do I need to have already received a fine?
faq.a2: Absolutely not. Our service is preventive: we make you compliant before inspections or fines arrive.
faq.q3: What does the monthly Monitor include?
faq.a3: Continuous regulatory monitoring, automatic documentation updates, alerts on new deadlines and priority email support.
faq.a4: Yes, we work with SMEs throughout Italy. Our service is 100% digital: audit, consulting and monitoring happen remotely, regardless of your company's location.
faq.q5: What happens if I don't comply by August 2026?
faq.a5: The AI Act provides for fines up to 7% of annual global revenue. Beyond the financial penalty, you risk operational shutdown of non-compliant AI systems.
